item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-loaded-action-v0.2","default_disposition":"refuse_next_local_repair","refusal":"Refuse the gate-side repeat as the default next repair. It would only add another verbal handoff to a pallet that is already missing a durable ripeness record.","mechanism_reframe":"The repeated mechanism is fragmented handoff capture: each pickup is being patched by a different local witness or relay, so the operation keeps substituting person-to-person repetition for a single authoritative pallet-level record.","upstream_next_action":"Move the decision upstream to establish one required ripeness capture point before pallet release, owned by the orchard-to-depot handover process rather than by the gate interaction.","requested_patch_delivery":null,"bounded_emergency":null}
